MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer. Case settled per the record. Trial date is vacated.

Appearances: JAMES MCCANN, 415/552-7859, defendant in pro per and moving party.
PAUL ARSHAWSKY, Esq., 415/241-1166, on behalf of plaintiff ROBERT BELOUS and opposing party.
